languages.text: "Вы напомнили мне о том, ради чего я жил, дорог{mf|ой|ая} наследни{mf|к|ца}. И это приятное воспоминание".
"You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."
languages.original_text: "Вы напомнили мне о том, ради чего я жил, дорог{mf|ой|ая} наследни{mf|к|ца}. И это приятное воспоминание".

traits.locale_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."
"You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."
"You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."
"You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

languages.text: "Ihr habt mich daran erinnert, wofür ich lebe, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Und das ist eine angenehme Erinnerung."
languages.original_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt mich daran erinnert, wofür ich lebe, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Und das ist eine angenehme Erinnerung."

languages.text: « Vous m'avez rappelé ma raison de vivre, {mf|mon cher héritier|ma chère héritière}. Et c'est un souvenir agréable. »
languages.original_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

traits.locale_text: « Vous m'avez rappelé ma raison de vivre, {mf|mon cher héritier|ma chère héritière}. Et c'est un souvenir agréable. »

languages.text: «Me ha recordado por qué viví, mi querid{mf|o|a} hereder{mf|o|a}. Es un grato recuerdo».
languages.original_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

traits.locale_text: «Me ha recordado por qué viví, mi querid{mf|o|a} hereder{mf|o|a}. Es un grato recuerdo».

languages.text: "Bana ne için yaşadığımı hatırlattın sevgili vârisim. Benim için güzel bir anıdır."
languages.original_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

traits.locale_text: "Bana ne için yaşadığımı hatırlattın sevgili vârisim. Benim için güzel bir anıdır."

languages.text: “你让我想起了我这一生所为何事，亲爱的继承人。那可真是一段美好的回忆。”
languages.original_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

traits.locale_text: “你让我想起了我这一生所为何事，亲爱的继承人。那可真是一段美好的回忆。”

languages.text: 「あなたのおかげで、私が生きてきた理由を思い出しました。それは、私にとって嬉しい思い出です。」
languages.original_text: "You have reminded me of what I lived for, dear heir. And that is a pleasant memory."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたのおかげで、私が生きてきた理由を思い出しました。それは、私にとって嬉しい思い出です。」
